name: Qualified Pipeline Generation API
what_it_does: Qualified REST API for AI-powered pipeline generation platform. Enables AI agents to query visitor intelligence data, retrieve conversation and meeting data, access pipeline signals, and integrate account-based engagement analytics into sales workflows. Qualified is deeply integrated with Salesforce and uses AI to identify high-intent website visitors for real-time sales engagement.
use_cases: Querying visitor intent signals and account identification from sales intelligence agents
Retrieving conversation and meeting data from sales activity analytics agents
Accessing pipeline attribution and influenced revenue data from RevOps agents
Integrating Qualified visitor intelligence into Salesforce CRM enrichment agents
not_for: Non-Salesforce CRM environments (Qualified is deeply Salesforce-native)
Simple chatbot or live chat without intent intelligence
best_when: A B2B marketing team using Salesforce + Qualified wants AI agents to surface high-intent visitor signals, analyze pipeline influence, and integrate real-time engagement data into ABM and sales workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Visitor tracking and identification involves third-party behavioral data — GDPR/CCPA compliance required. Qualified is enterprise-priced for Salesforce customers.

auth.notes: Qualified API key authentication. Keys from account settings. Enterprise access required.

pricing.notes: Enterprise pipeline generation platform. Requires Salesforce. Pricing negotiated.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Website visitor tracking and identification — GDPR/CCPA consent required
No public MCP server — API requires enterprise Qualified account
Deep Salesforce dependency — Qualified data is most useful in Salesforce-native context
Visitor intelligence data is real-time — cache with short TTL for accuracy
API documentation is limited for non-enterprise customers
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Visitor tracking and behavioral intent data. GDPR/CCPA consent required for visitor identification. SOC2. Enterprise-only API.

security_score_components.security_notes: Visitor behavioral tracking data. GDPR/CCPA consent required. SOC2. Enterprise-only.
